column1: a  Corrected for initial Th/U disequilibrium using radiogenic 208Pb and Th/U[magma] specified.
b  Isotopic dates calculated using lambda238 = 1.55125E-10 (Jaffey et al. 1971) and lambda235 = 9.8485E-10 (Jaffey et al. 1971).
c  Total mass of radiogenic Pb.
d  Total mass of common Pb.
e  Ratio of radiogenic Pb (including 208Pb) to common Pb.
f  Th contents calculated from radiogenic 208Pb and 230Th-corrected 206Pb/238U date of the sample and  assuming concordance between U-Pb Th-Pb systems.
g  Th/U ratio of magma from which mineral crystallized.
h  Measured ratio corrected for fractionation and spike contribution only.
i  Measured ratios corrected for fractionation and  tracer and blank.
